title: Golden Globes 2026: See the Complete Winners List
text: Golden Globes 2026 Winners. Major Film Awards: Best Motion Picture Drama: Hamnet. Best Motion Picture Musical or Comedy: One Battle After Another. Best Director: Paul Thomas Anderson (One Battle After Another). Best Screenplay: One Battle After Another. Film Acting Categories: Male Actor, Drama: Wagner Moura (The Secret Agent). Female Actor, Drama: Jessie Buckley (Hamnet). Male Actor, Musical or Comedy: Timothée Chalamet (Marty Supreme). Female Actor, Musical or Comedy: Rose Byrne (If I Had Legs I'd Kick You). Male Supporting Actor: Stellan Skarsgård (Sentimental Value). Female Supporting Actor: Teyana Taylor (One Battle After Another). Television Awards: Drama Series: The Pitt. Comedy Series: The Studio. Limited Series: Adolescence. Podcast of the Year: Good Hang With Amy Poehler. Stand-Up Comedy: Ricky Gervais (Mortality). Other Notable Winners: Non-English Language Film: The Secret Agent. Animated Feature: KPop Demon Hunters. Box Office Achievement: Sinners.
